scope: train-daemon per-job eval/export log files + train-live dispatch guard (default-closed, per-dispatch allow_during_train opt-in)
sha_convention: sha256 over on-disk raw bytes; file(1) reports server.py as UTF-8 text with LF line endings (no CRLF); log-file hashes likewise over raw on-disk bytes
spec: research/eng105-daemon-diff-spec.md — 5 hunks, eval/export paths only, train path byte-identical except additive log_name field; signed off by gate owner before edit (mail 14478)

rollout.shutdown: POST /shutdown (self-refusing while jobs run) honored; connection-closed-on-success is expected and pre-existing (os._exit(0) terminates before the HTTP response completes)
rollout.relaunch: train_daemon_start; 414 persisted jobs loaded across the restart

A_legacy_fallback.what: pre-restart persisted job (no log_name field) must resolve through the new reader path to the legacy shared log name

B_per_job_logs_two_concurrent_evals.what: two concurrent CPU eval sub-jobs of one parent must land in distinct per-job log files, neither truncated
B_per_job_logs_two_concurrent_evals.neither_truncated: each log carries its own start + 8 ticks + done (10 lines), pid-tagged, no interleaving

C_dispatch_guard_409.what: eval dispatch while a train job is live must be refused with HTTP 409 unless allow_during_train=true
C_dispatch_guard_409.detail: train job cabfdd34 live — eval dispatch refused (log/resource contention); set allow_during_train=true to override

D_override_allow_during_train.what: same dispatch with allow_during_train=true must run to completion during the live train job
D_override_allow_during_train.dispatch: POST /jobs/{parent}/eval with body {"eval_script": probe_eval.py, "allow_during_train": true} while cabfdd34 running

train_path_unchanged.claim: train job behavior byte-identical except the additive log_name field
train_path_unchanged.evidence: post-edit train probe cabfdd34 wrote train.log at its output_dir (B:/M/avir/eli/state/ember-eng/eng105/models/probe/train.log) exactly as before; start->done complete

probes.eval_script: B:/M/avir/eli/state/ember-eng/eng105/probe_eval.py (8-tick CPU marker probe, no GPU, no model)

notes: PRE-EXISTING, not introduced by this change: create_job derives cwd=<script grandparent>/scripts and returns 500 if that dir is absent; worked around for the probe by creating B:/M/avir/eli/state/ember-eng/scripts. Daemon nit, out of #105 scope.
PRE-EXISTING: /shutdown success presents as connection-closed (os._exit(0) before response flush).
Verification unblocks the deferred t1_chunked/w1 runtime-import concurrent-eval checks (spec rollout note).
